military_weapons.name: Pulse Rifle
military_weapons.description: Standard-issue fully automatic rifle with armor-penetrating rounds
special_rules: High Rate of Fire: Can fire 3 shots per activation
Armor Penetration: Ignores up to 1 point of armor save

military_weapons.name: Smart Gun
military_weapons.description: Computer-assisted heavy weapon with target tracking
special_rules: Auto-Targeting: Re-roll one missed shot per activation
Heavy: Requires 2 actions to fire (move OR shoot)
Suppression: Target must pass Morale check or cannot act next round

military_weapons.name: Flamethrower
military_weapons.description: Short-range area denial weapon that ignites targets
special_rules: Cone Template: Hits all targets in 8" cone, 4" wide at end
Ignores Cover: Cover provides no benefit against flames
Terror Effect: Bugs hit must immediately make Morale check
Burning: Targets that survive take 1 additional damage at start of next round

military_weapons.name: Combat Shotgun
military_weapons.description: Powerful close-range weapon for corridor fighting
special_rules: Close Quarters Specialist: +1 to hit at ranges 6" or less
Knockback: On successful hit, push target 1D3" directly away
Breaching: Can be used to destroy doors and light obstacles

military_weapons.name: Sniper Rifle
military_weapons.description: High-powered precision weapon for long-range elimination
special_rules: Precise: Ignores cover bonuses
Long Range: No penalty at maximum range
Headshot: Natural 6 to hit deals +2 damage

military_equipment.name: Motion Tracker
military_equipment.description: Portable device that detects movement within range
special_rules: Detection Range: Reveals all enemies within 12" at start of each round
Blip Tracking: Shows direction and approximate distance to hidden enemies
Audio Cue: Beeping intensifies as enemies get closer (narrative effect)
Range Penalty: -2" range for each previous round of continuous use (battery drain)

military_equipment.name: Sentry Gun
military_equipment.description: Automated defense turret with motion detection
special_rules: Deployment: Requires 1 action to deploy. Cannot move once placed
Autonomous: Fires automatically at start of enemy turn at nearest visible enemy
Arc of Fire: 180° arc in facing direction
Ammunition: Can fire for 3 rounds before depleting
Hackable: Bugs with Tech ability can shut down on Savvy check

military_equipment.name: Combat Armor
special_rules: Enhanced Protection: 4+ armor save against all attacks
Sealed Environment: Immune to acid, fire, and atmospheric hazards
Powered Servos: Ignore Heavy weapon penalties
Bulk: -1" movement speed

military_equipment.name: Med Kit
military_equipment.description: Advanced field medical supplies for battlefield trauma care
special_rules: Stabilize: Can revive Knocked Out soldier within 2" (requires 1 action)
Heal: Restore 1D3 health to wounded soldier (requires 1 action)
Limited Uses: Contains 3 doses
Combat Drugs: Can inject for +1 to all stats for 2 rounds (counts as 1 dose, soldier fatigued after)

military_equipment.name: Breach Charges
military_equipment.description: Shaped explosive charges for destroying obstacles
special_rules: Demolition: Automatically destroys doors, barricades, and light obstacles
Explosive Damage: 2D6 damage in 2" radius
Placement: Requires 1 action to place, detonates at start of next round
Limited: Soldier carries 2 charges

military_equipment.name: Combat Shield
special_rules: Cover Bonus: Grants +1 to armor save against ranged attacks from front arc
Melee Defense: +1 to melee defense rolls
Mobile Cover: Can provide cover to adjacent ally
Restriction: Cannot use two-handed weapons while equipped

military_equipment.name: Tactical Scanner
special_rules: Scan: Reveals enemy types and threat levels within 18"
Weak Point Detection: Grants +1 to hit against scanned enemies
Tactical Data: Provides information about enemy special abilities
Passive: Always active, no action required

military_equipment.name: Grenade Launcher
special_rules: Indirect Fire: Can shoot over obstacles and cover
Blast Radius: 3" radius, hits all targets in area
Ammunition Types: Frag (2 damage), Smoke (blocks LOS), Flash (stuns enemies)
Limited Ammo: 6 grenades per mission

equipment_availability.starting_equipment: All soldiers begin with Pulse Rifle and standard Combat Armor
equipment_availability.requisition_system: Spend Requisition Points between missions to acquire new equipment
equipment_availability.requisition_points_earned: 1-3 RP per successful mission based on performance
equipment_availability.equipment_loss: Soldiers killed in action lose all equipped items unless recovered
